audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Numbers / Bemidbar camp-arrangement text tradition, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for tribal standards, east/south/west/north camps, marching order, totals, and Levite center. Anti-hierarchy and anti-militarization safeguards required.

verses.restored: YHWH spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
Children of Israel shall camp, each by his standard, with signs of houses of their fathers; at a distance around tent of meeting they shall camp.
Those camping eastward toward sunrise shall be standard of camp of Judah by their hosts; leader of sons of Judah: Nahshon son of Amminadab.
His host and those counted of them: seventy-four thousand six hundred.
Camping next to him shall be tribe of Issachar; leader of sons of Issachar: Nethanel son of Zuar.
His host and those counted: fifty-four thousand four hundred.
Then tribe of Zebulun; leader of sons of Zebulun: Eliab son of Helon.
His host and those counted: fifty-seven thousand four hundred.
All counted of camp of Judah by their hosts: one hundred eighty-six thousand four hundred; they shall set out first.
Standard of camp of Reuben shall be southward by their hosts; leader of sons of Reuben: Elizur son of Shedeur.
His host and those counted: forty-six thousand five hundred.
Camping next to him shall be tribe of Simeon; leader of sons of Simeon: Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai.
His host and those counted: fifty-nine thousand three hundred.
Then tribe of Gad; leader of sons of Gad: Eliasaph son of Deuel.
His host and those counted: forty-five thousand six hundred fifty.
All counted of camp of Reuben by their hosts: one hundred fifty-one thousand four hundred fifty; they shall set out second.
Then tent of meeting shall set out, camp of Levites in midst of camps; as they camp, so they shall set out, each in his place by their standards.
Standard of camp of Ephraim by their hosts shall be westward; leader of sons of Ephraim: Elishama son of Ammihud.
His host and those counted: forty thousand five hundred.
Next to him shall be tribe of Manasseh; leader of sons of Manasseh: Gamaliel son of Pedahzur.
His host and those counted: thirty-two thousand two hundred.
Then tribe of Benjamin; leader of sons of Benjamin: Abidan son of Gideoni.
His host and those counted: thirty-five thousand four hundred.
All counted of camp of Ephraim by their hosts: one hundred eight thousand one hundred; they shall set out third.
Standard of camp of Dan shall be northward by their hosts; leader of sons of Dan: Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai.
His host and those counted: sixty-two thousand seven hundred.
Camping next to him shall be tribe of Asher; leader of sons of Asher: Pagiel son of Ocran.
His host and those counted: forty-one thousand five hundred.
Then tribe of Naphtali; leader of sons of Naphtali: Ahira son of Enan.
His host and those counted: fifty-three thousand four hundred.
All counted of camp of Dan: one hundred fifty-seven thousand six hundred; they shall set out last by their standards.
These are those counted of children of Israel by houses of fathers; all counted of camps by hosts were six hundred three thousand five hundred fifty.
But Levites were not counted among children of Israel, as YHWH commanded Moses.
Children of Israel did according to all YHWH commanded Moses; so they camped by standards and so they set out, each by clans, according to houses of fathers.

translation_notes: The camp is arranged around the tent of meeting; Divine presence, not military power, occupies the center.
Marching order is functional organization, not a statement of greater tribal worth.
Levites remain outside the military census because their assigned service differs.
Standards and household signs preserve communal identity within a moving people.
safety_note: Do not use Numbers 2 to rank tribes, ethnicities, families, or social groups. The formation is logistical and liturgical: a whole community moves with the dwelling-place at its center.
